title: VBU Time Table 2025 @ vbu.ac.in

detail.title: VBU Time Table 2025 @ vbu.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of VBU have released the VBU Time Table 2025 for Diploma Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: VBU Time Table 2025 is Out! The Vinoba Bhave University has released the Diploma. For further updates on VBU, candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: How to Download the VBU Time Table 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Vinoba Bhave University Time Table 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Time Table for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

rows: Programme for Diploma in Food Quality Assessment & Food Safety & Forensic Science Sem.-II Exam. (2024-25)
